title: Provision AWS RDS Production Database with Automated Backups
description:
Provision an AWS RDS instance for the production database with automated backups (7-day retention). Multi-AZ deployment if budget allows.

### Requirements
- Laravel production connects to RDS
- Automated backups with 7-day retention
- Security group restricts access to Cloudways production IP only
- Database credentials stored in team vault
- Multi-AZ if budget allows
acceptance_criteria: Laravel production app connects to RDS successfully
Automated backups are configured with 7-day retention
Security group restricts access to Cloudways production IP
implementation_notes: Part of Phase 2 as documented in docs/JIRA_TICKET_BACKLOG.md.
